title: Update generate-commands: add quiz-agent + post-generation flat-file cleanup (#48/#50)
description: generate-commands.md lacks quiz-agent.md in its explicit output list, and never scans for flat-path orphans after generation. Add quiz-agent.md to known commands list and add a post-generation step that scans .claude/commands/ for the 13 known flat filenames and prompts user to remove them.
